mapper.sql: id, title, is_content_empty, creator_id, topic_id, is_top, `type`, img_uris, video_uris, visible, create_time, update_time, `status`, content_uuid, topic_name
mapper.select:
select
from t_note where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_note (id, title, is_content_empty, creator_id, topic_id, is_top, `type`, img_uris, video_uris, visible, create_time, update_time, `status`, content_uuid, topic_name ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isContentEmpty,jdbcType=BIT}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isTop,jdbcType=BIT}, #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{imgUris,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoUris,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visible,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{contentUuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{topicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into t_note
id,
title,
is_content_empty,
creator_id,
topic_id,
is_top,
`type`,
img_uris,
video_uris,
visible,
create_time,
update_time,
`status`,
content_uuid,
topic_name,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isContentEmpty,jdbcType=BIT},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

#{isTop,jdbcType=BIT},

mapper.update:
update t_note
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_content_empty = #{isContentEmpty,jdbcType=BIT},
creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
topic_id = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=BIT},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
img_uris = #{imgUris,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
video_uris = #{videoUris,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
visible = #{visible,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
content_uuid = #{contentUuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
topic_name = #{topicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_note set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_content_empty = #{isContentEmpty,jdbcType=BIT}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, topic_id = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=BIT}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, img_uris = #{imgUris,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, video_uris = #{videoUris,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visible = #{visible,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, content_uuid = #{contentUuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, topic_name = #{topicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
